ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the run belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for the run */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the run started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the training run was initiated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the training run */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the training run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number for the metrics */,
  "noise" REAL /* Noise level during training */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value during training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score during training */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss value */,
  "val_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy score */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metrics */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were recorded */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metrics */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
